objects.name: ogp-line-01
objects.description: Simulated OGP print line (SQL tick, no driver profile)

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET winding_roll = 'P1', speed_mpm = 100, meter_m = 0, last_event_label = '', machine_stop = false WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE stage_context SET is_active = true, order_no = 'DEMO-OGP-01' WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Demo stage ready"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT CASE WHEN ms.machine_stop THEN 'warn' WHEN ms.last_event_status = 'warn' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'ok' END AS status, 'Рулон на намотке' AS characteristic, ms.winding_roll AS value FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'ok', 'Скорость машины', CONCAT(ms.speed_mpm::text, ' м/мин') FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN ms.last_event_label <> '' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'ok' END, 'Событие машины', COALESCE(NULLIF(ms.last_event_label, ''), '—') FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"ms","sql":"SELECT winding_roll, speed_mpm::text AS speed_mpm, meter_m::text AS meter_m, last_event_label, CASE WHEN machine_stop THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS machine_stop FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"selectOne","var":"st","sql":"SELECT order_no, line_count_pm::text AS line_count_pm, line_count_passer::text AS line_count_passer FROM stage_context WHERE id = 1 AND is_active = true"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"eventCodes","sql":"SELECT code, name, requires_time::text AS requires_time, requires_meter::text AS requires_meter, requires_comment::text AS requires_comment, has_subcodes::text AS has_subcodes FROM event_code ORDER BY code"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"rolls","sql":"SELECT roll_id, label, is_scrap::text AS is_scrap, is_active_winding::text AS is_active_winding FROM roll WHERE stage_id = 1 ORDER BY roll_id"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"subcodes","sql":"SELECT parent_code, code, label FROM event_subcode ORDER BY parent_code, code"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"unprocessed","sql":"SELECT id::text AS id, signal_label, to_char(start_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS start_at, to_char(end_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS end_at, member_count::text AS member_count FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY start_at DESC"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","windingRoll":"${ms.winding_roll}","meterM":"${ms.meter_m}","speedMpm":"${ms.speed_mpm}","lastEventLabel":"${ms.last_event_label}","machineStop":"${ms.machine_stop}","orderNo":"${st.order_no}","lineCountPm":"${st.line_count_pm}","lineCountPasser":"${st.line_count_passer}","defaultDeleteNow":"${ms.machine_stop}","eventCodes":"${eventCodes}","rolls":"${rolls}","subcodes":"${subcodes}","unprocessed":"${unprocessed}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"when","var":"input.signalType","equals":"resume","then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET machine_stop = false, speed_mpm = 100, last_event_label = '', last_event_status = 'ok' WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Machine resumed"}}]},{"type":"when","var":"input.signalType","equals":"stop","then":[{"type":"setVar","var":"label","value":"Останов"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET machine_stop = true, last_event_label = 'Останов', last_event_status = 'warn', speed_mpm = 0 WHERE id = 1"}],"else":[{"type":"when","var":"input.signalType","equals":"knife","then":[{"type":"setVar","var":"label","value":"Удар ножа"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET last_event_label = 'Удар ножа', last_event_status = 'warn' WHERE id = 1"}],"else":[{"type":"setVar","var":"label","value":"Нажата кнопка \"Брак\" у машины"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET last_event_label = 'Нажата кнопка \"Брак\" у машины', last_event_status = 'warn' WHERE id = 1"}]}]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"nowMeter","sql":"SELECT meter_m::text AS meter_m FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"selectOne","var":"merged","sql":"SELECT u.id::text AS id FROM unprocessed_event u CROSS JOIN (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT CAST(setting_value AS integer) FROM app_setting WHERE setting_key = 'downtime_group_timeout_sec'), 300) AS sec) cfg WHERE u.status = 'pending' AND u.signal_label = ? AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - u.end_at)) < cfg.sec ORDER BY u.end_at DESC LIMIT 1","params":["${label}"]},{"type":"when","var":"merged","notNull":true,"then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE unprocessed_event SET end_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, end_meter = CAST(? AS numeric), member_count = member_count + 1 WHERE id = ?::uuid","params":["${nowMeter.meter_m}","${merged.id}"]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO unprocessed_member (id, unprocessed_id, signal_label, start_at, end_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?::uuid, ?, NOW(), NOW())","params":["${merged.id}","${label}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","merged":"yes","unprocessedId":"${merged.id}","signalLabel":"${label}"}}]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO raw_signal (id, signal_type, signal_label, start_at, end_at, start_meter, end_meter) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' MINUTE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, GREATEST(CAST(? AS numeric) - 500, 0), CAST(? AS numeric))","params":["${input.signalType}","${label}","${nowMeter.meter_m}","${nowMeter.meter_m}"]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO unprocessed_event (id, signal_label, start_at, end_at, start_meter, end_meter, member_count, status) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' MINUTE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, GREATEST(CAST(? AS numeric) - 500, 0), CAST(? AS numeric), 1, 'pending')","params":["${label}","${nowMeter.meter_m}","${nowMeter.meter_m}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"created","sql":"SELECT id::text AS id FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","unprocessedId":"${created.id}","signalLabel":"${label}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT id::text AS id, signal_label, to_char(start_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS start_at, to_char(end_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS end_at, member_count::text AS member_count FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY start_at DESC"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE unprocessed_event SET status = 'deleted', delete_comment = ? WHERE id = ANY(CAST(string_to_array(?, ',') AS uuid[]))","params":["${input.comment}","${input.ids}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Deleted"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"when","var":"input.step","equals":"1","then":[{"type":"when","var":"input.eventCode","equals":"","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION","error_message":"Укажите код события"}}]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":""}}]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"code","sql":"SELECT code, requires_time::text AS requires_time, requires_meter::text AS requires_meter FROM event_code WHERE code = ?","params":["${input.eventCode}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"code","message":"Unknown event code"},{"type":"when","var":"code.requires_meter","equals":"true","then":[{"type":"when","var":"input.startM","equals":"","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION","error_message":"Укажите метраж начала и конца"}}]},{"type":"when","var":"input.endM","equals":"","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION","error_message":"Укажите метраж начала и конца"}}]}]},{"type":"when","var":"input.deleteNow","equals":"false","then":[{"type":"when","var":"input.rollId","equals":"","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION","error_message":"Укажите рулон"}}]}]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":""}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"code","sql":"SELECT code, name FROM event_code WHERE code = ?","params":["${input.eventCode}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"code","message":"Unknown event code"},{"type":"selectOne","var":"st","sql":"SELECT id FROM stage_context WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id LIMIT 1"},{"type":"setVar","var":"statusVal","value":"Удален"},{"type":"when","var":"input.deleteNow","equals":"false","then":[{"type":"setVar","var":"statusVal","value":"Зарегистрирован"}]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"footage","sql":"SELECT GREATEST(COALESCE(?::numeric, 0) - COALESCE(?::numeric, 0), 0)::text AS v","params":["${input.endM}","${input.startM}"]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO process_event (id, stage_id, event_code, event_name, delete_now, roll_id, start_m, end_m, start_at, end_at, whole_stage, side, rows_json, card1, card2, comment_text, status, footage, unprocessed_id) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, ?, ?, CASE WHEN ? IN ('true','1','yes') THEN true ELSE false END, ?, CAST(? AS numeric), CAST(? AS numeric), CASE WHEN COALESCE(?, '') = '' THEN NULL ELSE (CURRENT_DATE + CAST(? AS TIME)) END, CASE WHEN COALESCE(?, '') = '' THEN NULL ELSE (CURRENT_DATE + CAST(? AS TIME)) END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('true','1') THEN true ELSE false END, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, CAST(? AS numeric), CASE WHEN COALESCE(?, '') = '' THEN NULL ELSE CAST(? AS uuid) END)","params":["${st.id}","${code.code}","${code.name}","${input.deleteNow}","${input.rollId}","${input.startM}","${input.endM}","${input.startAt}","${input.startAt}","${input.endAt}","${input.endAt}","${input.wholeStage}","${input.side}","${input.rows}","${input.card1}","${input.card2}","${input.comment}","${statusVal}","${footage.v}","${input.unprocessedId}","${input.unprocessedId}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"ev","sql":"SELECT id::text AS event_id, event_code, delete_now::text AS delete_now, roll_id, start_m::text AS start_m, end_m::text AS end_m, status FROM process_event ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1"},{"type":"when","var":"input.subcodes","notEquals":"","then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO process_event_subcode (id, event_id, subcode) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), CAST(? AS uuid), trim(x) FROM unnest(string_to_array(?, ',')) AS t(x) WHERE trim(x) <> ''","params":["${ev.event_id}","${input.subcodes}"]}]},{"type":"when","var":"ev.delete_now","equals":"true","then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO roll_map_interval (id, roll_id, map_type, start_m, end_m, event_id, event_code) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), '0'), 'grey', ?::numeric, ?::numeric, ?::uuid, ?)","params":["${input.rollId}","${input.startM}","${input.endM}","${ev.event_id}","${ev.event_code}"]}],"else":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO roll_map_interval (id, roll_id, map_type, start_m, end_m, event_id, event_code, side, rows_json) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, 'white', ?::numeric, ?::numeric, ?::uuid, ?, ?, ?)","params":["${input.rollId}","${input.startM}","${input.endM}","${ev.event_id}","${ev.event_code}","${input.side}","${input.rows}"]}]},{"type":"when","var":"input.unprocessedId","notEquals":"","then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE unprocessed_event SET status = 'processed' WHERE id = CAST(? AS uuid)","params":["${input.unprocessedId}"]}]},{"type":"invoke_function","objectPath":"root.platform.devices.ogp-mes-hub","functionName":"ogp_enqueue1cExport","input":{"eventId":"${ev.event_id}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","eventId":"${ev.event_id}","status":"${ev.status}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT p.id::text AS id, CONCAT(p.event_code, ' - ', p.event_name) AS event_label, to_char(p.start_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS start_time, to_char(p.end_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS end_time, p.footage::text AS footage FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE s.is_active = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC","params":["${input.orderNo}","${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"total","sql":"SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.footage), 0)::text AS total FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE s.is_active = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?)","params":["${input.orderNo}","${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}","totalFootage":"${total.total}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"ev","sql":"SELECT event_code, event_name, roll_id, start_m::text AS start_m, end_m::text AS end_m, status, comment_text, side, rows_json, card1, card2 FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid","params":["${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"ev","message":"Event not found"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"subcodes","sql":"SELECT subcode FROM process_event_subcode WHERE event_id = ?::uuid ORDER BY subcode","params":["${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT 'Код' AS param, CONCAT(event_code, ' - ', event_name) AS value FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Рулон', COALESCE(roll_id, '') FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Начало, м', COALESCE(start_m::text, '') FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Конец, м', COALESCE(end_m::text, '') FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Статус', status FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Комментарий', COALESCE(comment_text, '') FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid","params":["${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}","subcodes":"${subcodes}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE process_event SET comment_text = COALESCE(?, comment_text), start_m = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, '')::numeric, start_m), end_m = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, '')::numeric, end_m), footage = GREATEST(COALESCE(NULLIF(?, '')::numeric, end_m) - COALESCE(NULLIF(?, '')::numeric, start_m), 0) WHERE id = ?::uuid","params":["${input.comment}","${input.startM}","${input.endM}","${input.endM}","${input.startM}","${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Updated"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT code, name, requires_time::text AS requires_time, requires_meter::text AS requires_meter, requires_comment::text AS requires_comment, has_subcodes::text AS has_subcodes, exclude_from_1c::text AS exclude_from_1c FROM event_code ORDER BY code"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO event_code (code, name, requires_time, requires_meter, requires_comment, has_subcodes, exclude_from_1c) VALUES (?, ?, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name","params":["${input.code}","${input.name}","${input.requiresTime}","${input.requiresMeter}","${input.requiresComment}","${input.hasSubcodes}","${input.excludeFrom1c}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Saved"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO event_subcode (id, parent_code, code, label) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, ?, ?)","params":["${input.parentCode}","${input.code}","${input.label}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Subcode added"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT map_type, start_m::text AS start_m, end_m::text AS end_m, event_code, side, COALESCE(rows_json, '') AS rows_json FROM roll_map_interval WHERE roll_id = ? ORDER BY start_m","params":["${input.rollId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"st","sql":"SELECT order_no FROM stage_context WHERE is_active = true LIMIT 1"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"defects","sql":"SELECT event_code, start_m::text AS start_m, end_m::text AS end_m, side, COALESCE(rows_json, '') AS rows_json FROM roll_map_interval WHERE roll_id = ? AND map_type = 'white' ORDER BY start_m","params":["${input.rollId}"]},{"type":"setVar","var":"payload","value":"{\"rollId\":\"${input.rollId}\",\"orderNo\":\"${st.order_no}\"}"},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO roll_label_data (id, roll_id, order_no, payload_json) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, ?, ?)","params":["${input.rollId}","${st.order_no}","${payload}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rollId":"${input.rollId}","orderNo":"${st.order_no}","defects":"${defects}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT s.order_no, p.event_code, p.event_name, COUNT(*)::text AS event_count, COALESCE(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.end_at - p.start_at)) / 60), 0)::text AS downtime_min, COALESCE(SUM(p.footage), 0)::text AS total_footage FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE p.delete_now = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?) GROUP BY s.order_no, p.event_code, p.event_name ORDER BY s.order_no, p.event_code","params":["${input.orderNo}","${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"ev","sql":"SELECT p.id::text AS event_id, p.event_code, s.order_no, p.delete_now::text AS delete_now, p.roll_id, p.start_m::text AS start_m, p.end_m::text AS end_m, to_char(p.start_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD\"T\"HH24:MI:SS') AS start_at, to_char(p.end_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD\"T\"HH24:MI:SS') AS end_at, p.footage::text AS footage, COALESCE(p.side, '') AS side, COALESCE(p.rows_json, '') AS rows_json, COALESCE(p.comment_text, '') AS comment, p.status, ec.exclude_from_1c::text AS exclude_from_1c FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id JOIN event_code ec ON ec.code = p.event_code WHERE p.id = ?::uuid","params":["${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"ev","message":"Event not found"},{"type":"when","var":"ev.exclude_from_1c","equals":"true","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","skipped":"yes"}}]},{"type":"setVar","var":"payload","value":"{\"eventId\":\"${ev.event_id}\",\"eventCode\":\"${ev.event_code}\",\"orderNo\":\"${ev.order_no}\"}"},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO integration_outbox (id, event_id, payload_json, status) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?::uuid, ?, 'pending')","params":["${ev.event_id}","${payload}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","enqueued":"yes"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"pending","sql":"SELECT id::text AS id, event_id::text AS event_id, payload_json FROM integration_outbox WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 50"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE integration_outbox SET status = 'sent', exported_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'pending'"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","exported":"${pending}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET meter_m = meter_m + speed_mpm / 60.0 * 5 WHERE id = 1 AND machine_stop = false"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":""}}]}

bindings.query: SELECT COALESCE(CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE PRECISION), 0) AS v FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending'
SELECT winding_roll AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT speed_mpm AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT meter_m AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT winding_roll AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT CASE WHEN machine_stop THEN 0 ELSE speed_mpm END AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT meter_m AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT machine_stop AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT last_event_label AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1

reports.title: Необработанные события
reports.query: SELECT CAST(id AS varchar) AS id, signal_label, to_char(start_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS start_at, to_char(end_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS end_at, member_count FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY start_at DESC

reports.title: Журнал процесса
reports.query: SELECT CAST(p.id AS varchar) AS id, p.event_code AS code, CONCAT(p.event_code, ' - ', p.event_name) AS event_label, to_char(p.start_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS start_time, to_char(p.end_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS end_time, p.start_m AS meter_from, p.end_m AS meter_to, p.footage, p.status, COALESCE(p.roll_id, '') AS roll_id, COALESCE(p.comment_text, '') AS comment FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE s.is_active = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

reports.title: Справочник кодов событий
reports.query: SELECT code, name, requires_time, requires_meter, requires_comment, has_subcodes, exclude_from_1c FROM event_code ORDER BY code

reports.title: Данные с машины
reports.query: SELECT CASE WHEN ms.machine_stop THEN 'warn' WHEN ms.last_event_status = 'warn' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'ok' END AS status, 'Рулон на намотке' AS characteristic, ms.winding_roll AS value FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'ok', 'Скорость машины', CONCAT(ms.speed_mpm::text, ' м/мин') FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN ms.last_event_label <> '' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'ok' END, 'Событие машины', COALESCE(NULLIF(ms.last_event_label, ''), '—') FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1

reports.title: Подкоды событий
reports.query: SELECT parent_code, code, label FROM event_subcode ORDER BY parent_code, code

reports.title: Рулоны
reports.query: SELECT r.roll_id AS code, r.label FROM roll r JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = r.stage_id WHERE s.is_active = true ORDER BY r.roll_id

reports.title: Простои по заказу
reports.query: SELECT s.order_no, p.event_code, p.event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.end_at - p.start_at)) / 60), 0)::numeric, 1) AS downtime_min, COALESCE(SUM(p.footage), 0) AS total_footage FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE p.delete_now = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?) GROUP BY s.order_no, p.event_code, p.event_name ORDER BY s.order_no, p.event_code

reports.title: Карта рулона
reports.query: SELECT map_type, start_m, end_m, event_code, side, COALESCE(rows_json, '') AS rows_json FROM roll_map_interval WHERE roll_id = ? ORDER BY start_m

reports.title: Этикетки рулонов
reports.query: SELECT roll_id, order_no, payload_json, created_at FROM roll_label_data ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

reports.title: Очередь 1С
reports.query: SELECT id, event_id, status, exported_at, LEFT(payload_json, 120) AS payload_preview FROM integration_outbox ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50

workflows.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL"
             xmlns:ispf="http://ispf.io/bpmn"
             targetNamespace="http://ispf.io/bpmn">
  <process id="ogp-export-1c" name="OGP 1C Export" isExecutable="true">
    <startEvent id="start"/>
    <serviceTask id="exportBatch" name="Export to 1C outbox"
                 ispf:action="invoke_function"
                 ispf:objectPath="root.platform.devices.ogp-mes-hub"
                 ispf:functionName="ogp_export1cBatch"/>
    <endEvent id="end"/>
    <sequenceFlow sourceRef="start" targetRef="exportBatch"/>
    <sequenceFlow sourceRef="exportBatch" targetRef="end"/>
  </process>
</definitions>

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"shifts","sql":"SELECT id::text AS shift_id, line_code, shift_label, planned_minutes, downtime_minutes, total_units, good_units FROM mes_oee_shift ORDER BY line_code, shift_label"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${shifts}","fields":{"shiftId":"${item.shift_id}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","shiftLabel":"${item.shift_label}","plannedMinutes":"${item.planned_minutes}","downtimeMinutes":"${item.downtime_minutes}","totalUnits":"${item.total_units}","goodUnits":"${item.good_units}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"kpi","sql":"SELECT line_code, shift_label, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 THEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 100.0 / planned_minutes ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS availability_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN LEAST(100.0, ideal_cycle_sec * total_units * 100.0 / ((planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 60)) ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS performance_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN total_units > 0 THEN good_units * 100.0 / total_units ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS quality_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN (CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 THEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 1.0 / planned_minutes ELSE 0 END) * (CASE WHEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN LEAST(1.0, ideal_cycle_sec * total_units * 1.0 / ((planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 60)) ELSE 0 END) * (CASE WHEN total_units > 0 THEN good_units * 1.0 / total_units ELSE 0 END) * 100 ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS oee_pct FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"kpi","message":"Shift not found"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","lineCode":"${kpi.line_code}","shiftLabel":"${kpi.shift_label}","availabilityPct":"${kpi.availability_pct}","performancePct":"${kpi.performance_pct}","qualityPct":"${kpi.quality_pct}","oeePct":"${kpi.oee_pct}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"shift","sql":"SELECT id, downtime_minutes, planned_minutes FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"shift","message":"Shift not found"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_oee_shift SET downtime_minutes = LEAST(planned_minutes, downtime_minutes + ?) WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.minutes}","${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"updated","sql":"SELECT downtime_minutes FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","downtimeMinutes":"${updated.downtime_minutes}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"lines","sql":"SELECT line_code, display_name, area_path FROM mes_platform_line ORDER BY line_code"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${lines}","fields":{"lineCode":"${item.line_code}","displayName":"${item.display_name}","areaPath":"${item.area_path}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"writeVariable","objectPath":"root.platform.mes.work-orders.wo-line-a01-001","variable":"status","fields":{"value":"complete"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","confirmed":true,"workOrderPath":"${input.workOrderPath}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"samples","sql":"SELECT id::text AS sample_id, line_code, measurement_mm, sample_ts::text AS sample_ts FROM mes_spc_sample ORDER BY sample_ts DESC LIMIT 20"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${samples}","fields":{"sampleId":"${item.sample_id}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","measurementMm":"${item.measurement_mm}","sampleTs":"${item.sample_ts}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"links","sql":"SELECT l.lot_id, l.lot_path, l.material_code, m.display_name AS material_name, l.work_order_number, l.line_code, l.quantity, l.status AS lot_status, q.quality_id, COALESCE(q.defect_code, '') AS defect_code, COALESCE(q.severity, '') AS severity, COALESCE(q.result, '') AS quality_result, COALESCE(q.recorded_at::text, '') AS recorded_at FROM mes_genealogy_lot l JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.material_code LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_quality q ON q.lot_id = l.lot_id ORDER BY l.lot_id, q.recorded_at"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${links}","fields":{"lotId":"${item.lot_id}","lotPath":"${item.lot_path}","materialCode":"${item.material_code}","materialName":"${item.material_name}","workOrderNumber":"${item.work_order_number}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","lotStatus":"${item.lot_status}","qualityId":"${item.quality_id}","defectCode":"${item.defect_code}","severity":"${item.severity}","qualityResult":"${item.quality_result}","recordedAt":"${item.recorded_at}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"links","sql":"SELECT l.lot_id, l.lot_path, l.material_code, m.display_name AS material_name, l.work_order_number, l.line_code, l.quantity, l.status AS lot_status, q.quality_id, COALESCE(q.defect_code, '') AS defect_code, COALESCE(q.severity, '') AS severity, COALESCE(q.result, '') AS quality_result, COALESCE(q.recorded_at::text, '') AS recorded_at FROM mes_genealogy_lot l JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.material_code LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_quality q ON q.lot_id = l.lot_id WHERE l.lot_id = ? ORDER BY q.recorded_at","params":["${input.lotId}"]},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${links}","fields":{"lotId":"${item.lot_id}","lotPath":"${item.lot_path}","materialCode":"${item.material_code}","materialName":"${item.material_name}","workOrderNumber":"${item.work_order_number}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","lotStatus":"${item.lot_status}","qualityId":"${item.quality_id}","defectCode":"${item.defect_code}","severity":"${item.severity}","qualityResult":"${item.quality_result}","recordedAt":"${item.recorded_at}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","lotId":"${input.lotId}","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"edges","sql":"SELECT i.entity_id AS from_entity_id, COALESCE(src.lot_id, '') AS from_lot_id, COALESCE(src.material_code, '') AS from_material_code, o.entity_id AS to_entity_id, COALESCE(dst.lot_id, '') AS to_lot_id, COALESCE(dst.material_code, '') AS to_material_code, a.activity_id, a.activity_type, o.quantity AS quantity, a.work_order_number, a.line_code, CAST(a.occurred_at AS VARCHAR) AS occurred_at FROM mes_tracked_activity a JOIN mes_tracked_activity_input i ON i.activity_id = a.activity_id JOIN mes_tracked_activity_output o ON o.activity_id = a.activity_id JOIN mes_tracked_entity src ON src.entity_id = i.entity_id JOIN mes_tracked_entity dst ON dst.entity_id = o.entity_id WHERE src.lot_id = ? OR dst.lot_id = ? OR src.entity_id = ? OR dst.entity_id = ? ORDER BY a.activity_id, i.entity_id, o.entity_id","params":["${input.lotId}","${input.lotId}","${input.lotId}","${input.lotId}"]},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${edges}","fields":{"fromEntityId":"${item.from_entity_id}","fromLotId":"${item.from_lot_id}","fromMaterialCode":"${item.from_material_code}","toEntityId":"${item.to_entity_id}","toLotId":"${item.to_lot_id}","toMaterialCode":"${item.to_material_code}","activityId":"${item.activity_id}","activityType":"${item.activity_type}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","workOrderNumber":"${item.work_order_number}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","occurredAt":"${item.occurred_at}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","lotId":"${input.lotId}","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"edges","sql":"SELECT i.entity_id AS from_entity_id, COALESCE(src.lot_id, '') AS from_lot_id, COALESCE(src.material_code, '') AS from_material_code, o.entity_id AS to_entity_id, COALESCE(dst.lot_id, '') AS to_lot_id, COALESCE(dst.material_code, '') AS to_material_code, a.activity_id, a.activity_type, o.quantity AS quantity, a.work_order_number, a.line_code, CAST(a.occurred_at AS VARCHAR) AS occurred_at FROM mes_tracked_activity a JOIN mes_tracked_activity_input i ON i.activity_id = a.activity_id JOIN mes_tracked_activity_output o ON o.activity_id = a.activity_id JOIN mes_tracked_entity src ON src.entity_id = i.entity_id JOIN mes_tracked_entity dst ON dst.entity_id = o.entity_id ORDER BY a.activity_id, i.entity_id, o.entity_id"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${edges}","fields":{"fromEntityId":"${item.from_entity_id}","fromLotId":"${item.from_lot_id}","fromMaterialCode":"${item.from_material_code}","toEntityId":"${item.to_entity_id}","toLotId":"${item.to_lot_id}","toMaterialCode":"${item.to_material_code}","activityId":"${item.activity_id}","activityType":"${item.activity_type}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","workOrderNumber":"${item.work_order_number}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","occurredAt":"${item.occurred_at}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_batch_run SET phase = ?, batch_id = ?, recipe = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), recipe), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE batch_path = ?","params":["${input.phase}","${input.batchId}","${input.recipe}","${input.batchPath}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"updated","sql":"SELECT batch_path FROM mes_batch_run WHERE batch_path = ?","params":["${input.batchPath}"]},{"type":"when","var":"updated","notNull":false,"then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO mes_batch_run (batch_path, batch_id, recipe, phase) VALUES (?, ?, COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), 'default-recipe'), ?)","params":["${input.batchPath}","${input.batchId}","${input.recipe}","${input.phase}"]}]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","batchPath":"${input.batchPath}","phase":"${input.phase}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"batch","sql":"SELECT batch_id, recipe, phase FROM mes_batch_run WHERE batch_path = ?","params":["${input.batchPath}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"batch","message":"Batch not found"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","batchPath":"${input.batchPath}","batchId":"${batch.batch_id}","recipe":"${batch.recipe}","phase":"${batch.phase}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO mes_erp_outbox (id, entity_type, entity_id, payload_json, idempotency_key, status) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), ?, ?, ?, CONCAT(?, ':', ?), 'pending' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_erp_outbox WHERE idempotency_key = CONCAT(?, ':', ?))","params":["${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}","${input.payloadJson}","${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}","${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"keyRow","sql":"SELECT CONCAT(?, ':', ?) AS idempotency_key","params":["${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","enqueued":true,"idempotencyKey":"${keyRow.idempotency_key}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"pending","sql":"SELECT id::text AS outbox_id, entity_type, entity_id, idempotency_key FROM mes_erp_outbox WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 50"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_erp_outbox SET status = 'sent', processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE status = 'pending'"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${pending}","fields":{"outboxId":"${item.outbox_id}","entityType":"${item.entity_type}","entityId":"${item.entity_id}","idempotencyKey":"${item.idempotency_key}","status":"sent"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"flat","sql":"WITH RECURSIVE bom_tree (bom_id, parent_material_code, revision, line_no, component_material_code, quantity, uom, level_no, path) AS (SELECT h.bom_id, h.parent_material_code, h.revision, l.line_no, l.component_material_code, CAST(l.quantity AS NUMERIC(12,3)), l.uom, 1, CONCAT(h.parent_material_code, '>', l.component_material_code) FROM mes_bom_header h JOIN mes_bom_line l ON l.bom_id = h.bom_id WHERE h.parent_material_code = ? AND h.status = 'active' UNION ALL SELECT h2.bom_id, h2.parent_material_code, h2.revision, l2.line_no, l2.component_material_code, CAST(bt.quantity * l2.quantity AS NUMERIC(12,3)), l2.uom, bt.level_no + 1, CONCAT(bt.path, '>', l2.component_material_code) FROM bom_tree bt JOIN mes_bom_header h2 ON h2.parent_material_code = bt.component_material_code AND h2.status = 'active' JOIN mes_bom_line l2 ON l2.bom_id = h2.bom_id) SELECT bt.bom_id, bt.parent_material_code, bt.revision, bt.line_no, bt.component_material_code, COALESCE(m.display_name, '') AS component_name, bt.quantity, bt.uom, bt.level_no, bt.path FROM bom_tree bt LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = bt.component_material_code ORDER BY bt.level_no, bt.line_no, bt.component_material_code","params":["${input.materialCode}"]},{"type":"selectMany","var":"nested","sql":"SELECT h.bom_id, h.parent_material_code, h.revision, l.line_no, l.component_material_code, COALESCE(m.display_name, '') AS component_name, l.quantity, l.uom, 1 AS level_no, CONCAT(h.parent_material_code, '>', l.component_material_code) AS path FROM mes_bom_header h JOIN mes_bom_line l ON l.bom_id = h.bom_id LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.component_material_code WHERE h.parent_material_code = ? AND h.status = 'active' ORDER BY l.line_no","params":["${input.materialCode}"]},{"type":"map","var":"flatRows","source":"${flat}","fields":{"bomId":"${item.bom_id}","parentMaterialCode":"${item.parent_material_code}","revision":"${item.revision}","lineNo":"${item.line_no}","componentMaterialCode":"${item.component_material_code}","componentName":"${item.component_name}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","uom":"${item.uom}","level":"${item.level_no}","path":"${item.path}"}},{"type":"map","var":"nestedRows","source":"${nested}","fields":{"bomId":"${item.bom_id}","parentMaterialCode":"${item.parent_material_code}","revision":"${item.revision}","lineNo":"${item.line_no}","componentMaterialCode":"${item.component_material_code}","componentName":"${item.component_name}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","uom":"${item.uom}","level":"${item.level_no}","path":"${item.path}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","materialCode":"${input.materialCode}","rows":"${flatRows}","nestedRows":"${nestedRows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"parents","sql":"SELECT h.bom_id, h.parent_material_code, COALESCE(m.display_name, '') AS parent_name, h.revision, l.line_no, l.quantity, l.uom, h.status FROM mes_bom_header h JOIN mes_bom_line l ON l.bom_id = h.bom_id LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = h.parent_material_code WHERE l.component_material_code = ? ORDER BY h.parent_material_code, h.revision, l.line_no","params":["${input.componentMaterialCode}"]},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${parents}","fields":{"bomId":"${item.bom_id}","parentMaterialCode":"${item.parent_material_code}","parentName":"${item.parent_name}","revision":"${item.revision}","lineNo":"${item.line_no}","quantity":"${item.quantity}","uom":"${item.uom}","status":"${item.status}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","componentMaterialCode":"${input.componentMaterialCode}","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"ready","sql":"SELECT s.wo_number, d.operation_id, d.routing_id, d.name, d.work_center, d.sequence_no, s.status FROM mes_operation_status s JOIN mes_operation_def d ON d.operation_id = s.operation_id WHERE s.wo_number = ? AND s.status = 'ready' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_operation_edge e LEFT JOIN mes_operation_status ps ON ps.wo_number = s.wo_number AND ps.operation_id = e.predecessor_op WHERE e.routing_id = d.routing_id AND e.successor_op = s.operation_id AND (ps.status IS NULL OR ps.status <> 'complete')) ORDER BY d.sequence_no","params":["${input.workOrderNumber}"]},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${ready}","fields":{"workOrderNumber":"${item.wo_number}","operationId":"${item.operation_id}","routingId":"${item.routing_id}","name":"${item.name}","workCenter":"${item.work_center}","sequenceNo":"${item.sequence_no}","status":"${item.status}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","workOrderNumber":"${input.workOrderNumber}","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"operation","sql":"SELECT operation_id FROM mes_operation_status WHERE wo_number = ? AND operation_id = ?","params":["${input.workOrderNumber}","${input.operationId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"operation","message":"Operation status not found"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_operation_status SET status = 'complete' WHERE wo_number = ? AND operation_id = ?","params":["${input.workOrderNumber}","${input.operationId}"]},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_operation_status SET status = 'ready' WHERE wo_number = ? AND status = 'pending' AND operation_id IN (SELECT e.successor_op FROM mes_operation_edge e WHERE e.predecessor_op = ? AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_operation_edge pe LEFT JOIN mes_operation_status ps ON ps.wo_number = ? AND ps.operation_id = pe.predecessor_op WHERE pe.routing_id = e.routing_id AND pe.successor_op = e.successor_op AND (ps.status IS NULL OR ps.status <> 'complete')))","params":["${input.workOrderNumber}","${input.operationId}","${input.workOrderNumber}"]},{"type":"selectMany","var":"ready","sql":"SELECT s.wo_number, d.operation_id, d.routing_id, d.name, d.work_center, d.sequence_no, s.status FROM mes_operation_status s JOIN mes_operation_def d ON d.operation_id = s.operation_id WHERE s.wo_number = ? AND s.status = 'ready' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_operation_edge e LEFT JOIN mes_operation_status ps ON ps.wo_number = s.wo_number AND ps.operation_id = e.predecessor_op WHERE e.routing_id = d.routing_id AND e.successor_op = s.operation_id AND (ps.status IS NULL OR ps.status <> 'complete')) ORDER BY d.sequence_no","params":["${input.workOrderNumber}"]},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${ready}","fields":{"workOrderNumber":"${item.wo_number}","operationId":"${item.operation_id}","routingId":"${item.routing_id}","name":"${item.name}","workCenter":"${item.work_center}","sequenceNo":"${item.sequence_no}","status":"${item.status}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","workOrderNumber":"${input.workOrderNumber}","operationId":"${input.operationId}","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

reports.title: MES Genealogy
reports.query: SELECT l.lot_id, l.material_code, m.display_name AS material_name, l.work_order_number, l.line_code, l.quantity, l.status AS lot_status, q.quality_id, COALESCE(q.defect_code, '') AS defect_code, COALESCE(q.severity, '') AS severity, COALESCE(q.result, '') AS quality_result FROM mes_genealogy_lot l JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.material_code LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_quality q ON q.lot_id = l.lot_id ORDER BY l.lot_id, q.quality_id

reports.title: MES Genealogy by lot
reports.description: Filter genealogy graph by lot id (seed: BATCH-LINE-A01-001)
reports.query: SELECT l.lot_id, l.material_code, m.display_name AS material_name, l.work_order_number, l.line_code, q.quality_id, COALESCE(q.defect_code, '') AS defect_code, COALESCE(q.result, '') AS quality_result FROM mes_genealogy_lot l JOIN mes_genealogy_material m ON m.material_code = l.material_code LEFT JOIN mes_genealogy_quality q ON q.lot_id = l.lot_id WHERE l.lot_id = ? ORDER BY q.quality_id

reports.title: MES Genealogy DAG
reports.query: SELECT i.entity_id AS from_entity_id, COALESCE(src.lot_id, '') AS from_lot_id, COALESCE(src.material_code, '') AS from_material_code, o.entity_id AS to_entity_id, COALESCE(dst.lot_id, '') AS to_lot_id, COALESCE(dst.material_code, '') AS to_material_code, a.activity_id, a.activity_type, o.quantity AS quantity, a.work_order_number, a.line_code, CAST(a.occurred_at AS VARCHAR) AS occurred_at FROM mes_tracked_activity a JOIN mes_tracked_activity_input i ON i.activity_id = a.activity_id JOIN mes_tracked_activity_output o ON o.activity_id = a.activity_id JOIN mes_tracked_entity src ON src.entity_id = i.entity_id JOIN mes_tracked_entity dst ON dst.entity_id = o.entity_id ORDER BY a.activity_id, i.entity_id, o.entity_id

migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_platform_line (line_code VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY, display_name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, area_path VARCHAR(256)); INSERT INTO mes_platform_line (line_code, display_name, area_path) SELECT 'LINE-A01', 'Assembly Line A01', 'root.platform.mes.instances.plant-a.areas.assembly.lines.line-a01' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_platform_line WHERE line_code = 'LINE-A01'); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mes_oee_shift (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, line_code VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL, shift_label VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, planned_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL, downtime_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL, ideal_cycle_sec INTEGER NOT NULL, total_units INTEGER NOT NULL, good_units INTEGER NOT NULL); INSERT INTO mes_oee_shift (id, line_code, shift_label, planned_minutes, downtime_minutes, ideal_cycle_sec, total_units, good_units) SELECT 'dddddddd-dddd-dddd-dddd-dddddddddddd', 'LINE-A01', 'Morning', 480, 45, 12, 2100, 2050 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE line_code = 'LINE-A01' AND shift_label = 'Morning');

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"shifts","sql":"SELECT id::text AS shift_id, line_code, shift_label, planned_minutes, downtime_minutes, total_units, good_units FROM mes_oee_shift ORDER BY line_code, shift_label"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${shifts}","fields":{"shiftId":"${item.shift_id}","lineCode":"${item.line_code}","shiftLabel":"${item.shift_label}","plannedMinutes":"${item.planned_minutes}","downtimeMinutes":"${item.downtime_minutes}","totalUnits":"${item.total_units}","goodUnits":"${item.good_units}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"kpi","sql":"SELECT line_code, shift_label, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 THEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 100.0 / planned_minutes ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS availability_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN LEAST(100.0, ideal_cycle_sec * total_units * 100.0 / ((planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 60)) ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS performance_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN total_units > 0 THEN good_units * 100.0 / total_units ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS quality_pct, CAST(ROUND(CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN (CASE WHEN planned_minutes > 0 THEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 1.0 / planned_minutes ELSE 0 END) * (CASE WHEN (planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) > 0 AND total_units > 0 THEN LEAST(1.0, ideal_cycle_sec * total_units * 1.0 / ((planned_minutes - downtime_minutes) * 60)) ELSE 0 END) * (CASE WHEN total_units > 0 THEN good_units * 1.0 / total_units ELSE 0 END) * 100 ELSE 0 END, 0) AS INT) AS oee_pct FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"kpi","message":"Shift not found"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","lineCode":"${kpi.line_code}","shiftLabel":"${kpi.shift_label}","availabilityPct":"${kpi.availability_pct}","performancePct":"${kpi.performance_pct}","qualityPct":"${kpi.quality_pct}","oeePct":"${kpi.oee_pct}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"shift","sql":"SELECT id, downtime_minutes, planned_minutes FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"shift","message":"Shift not found"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_oee_shift SET downtime_minutes = LEAST(planned_minutes, downtime_minutes + ?) WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.minutes}","${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"updated","sql":"SELECT downtime_minutes FROM mes_oee_shift WHERE id = ?","params":["${input.shiftId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","downtimeMinutes":"${updated.downtime_minutes}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"lines","sql":"SELECT line_code, display_name, area_path FROM mes_platform_line ORDER BY line_code"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${lines}","fields":{"lineCode":"${item.line_code}","displayName":"${item.display_name}","areaPath":"${item.area_path}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}
{"steps":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","confirmed":true,"workOrderPath":"${input.workOrderPath}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_batch_run SET phase = ?, batch_id = ?, recipe = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), recipe), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE batch_path = ?","params":["${input.phase}","${input.batchId}","${input.recipe}","${input.batchPath}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"updated","sql":"SELECT batch_path FROM mes_batch_run WHERE batch_path = ?","params":["${input.batchPath}"]},{"type":"when","var":"updated","notNull":false,"then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO mes_batch_run (batch_path, batch_id, recipe, phase) VALUES (?, ?, COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), 'default-recipe'), ?)","params":["${input.batchPath}","${input.batchId}","${input.recipe}","${input.phase}"]}]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","batchPath":"${input.batchPath}","phase":"${input.phase}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO mes_erp_outbox (id, entity_type, entity_id, payload_json, idempotency_key, status) SELECT RANDOM_UUID(), ?, ?, ?, CONCAT(?, ':', ?), 'pending' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mes_erp_outbox WHERE idempotency_key = CONCAT(?, ':', ?))","params":["${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}","${input.payloadJson}","${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}","${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"keyRow","sql":"SELECT CONCAT(?, ':', ?) AS idempotency_key","params":["${input.entityType}","${input.entityId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","enqueued":true,"idempotencyKey":"${keyRow.idempotency_key}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"pending","sql":"SELECT id::text AS outbox_id, entity_type, entity_id, idempotency_key FROM mes_erp_outbox WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 50"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE mes_erp_outbox SET status = 'sent', processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE status = 'pending'"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${pending}","fields":{"outboxId":"${item.outbox_id}","entityType":"${item.entity_type}","entityId":"${item.entity_id}","idempotencyKey":"${item.idempotency_key}","status":"sent"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gpu_sim ( unit_code VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY, unit_index INTEGER NOT NULL, rated_kw DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 1480, load_pct DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 70, target_load_pct DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 70, setpoint_kw DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 1000, running BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true, was_running BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true, start_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, running_hours DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, energy_kwh DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, cmd_start BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false, cmd_stop BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ); INSERT INTO gpu_sim (unit_code, unit_index, rated_kw) SELECT 'gpu-01', 1, 1480 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gpu_sim WHERE unit_code = 'gpu-01'); INSERT INTO gpu_sim (unit_code, unit_index, rated_kw) SELECT 'gpu-02', 2, 1480 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gpu_sim WHERE unit_code = 'gpu-02'); INSERT INTO gpu_sim (unit_code, unit_index, rated_kw) SELECT 'gpu-03', 3, 1480 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gpu_sim WHERE unit_code = 'gpu-03');

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE gpu_sim SET cmd_start = false, cmd_stop = false, target_load_pct = CASE WHEN cmd_stop THEN 0 WHEN cmd_start THEN LEAST(100, target_load_pct + 5) WHEN setpoint_kw > 0 THEN LEAST(100, setpoint_kw / NULLIF(rated_kw,0) * 100) ELSE target_load_pct END, load_pct = CASE WHEN load_pct < target_load_pct THEN LEAST(target_load_pct, load_pct + 2.5) WHEN load_pct > target_load_pct THEN GREATEST(target_load_pct, load_pct - 4.0) ELSE load_pct END, running = (load_pct > 2), start_count = start_count + CASE WHEN load_pct > 2 AND NOT was_running THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, was_running = (load_pct > 2), running_hours = running_hours + CASE WHEN load_pct > 2 THEN 0.001 ELSE 0 END, energy_kwh = energy_kwh + (rated_kw * load_pct / 100.0) / 3600.0 * 5, updated_at = NOW()"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":""}}]}

workflows.title: OT Alarm Classify
workflows.toolDescription: Classify an OT alarm (severity + reason). Args: alarmId (required), optional alarmMessage.
workflows.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL"
             xmlns:ispf="http://ispf.io/bpmn"
             targetNamespace="http://ispf.io/bpmn">
  <process id="ot-alarm-classify" name="OT Alarm Classify" isExecutable="true">
    <startEvent id="start" name="Start"/>
    <serviceTask id="classify" name="LLM classify"
                 ispf:action="llm_complete"
                 ispf:promptTemplate="Classify OT alarm severity for id=${alarmId}. Message: ${alarmMessage}. Reply JSON only with keys severity (info|warning|critical) and reason."
                 ispf:outputVariable="llmClassification"
                 ispf:outputFormat="json"
                 ispf:modelRef="platform-default"
                 ispf:timeoutMs="30000"/>
    <serviceTask id="logResult" name="Log classification"
                 ispf:action="log"
                 ispf:message="ot-alarm-classify: ${alarmId} -> ${llmClassification}"/>
    <endEvent id="end" name="End"/>
    <sequenceFlow id="f1" sourceRef="start" targetRef="classify"/>
    <sequenceFlow id="f2" sourceRef="classify" targetRef="logResult"/>
    <sequenceFlow id="f3" sourceRef="logResult" targetRef="end"/>
  </process>
</definitions>

migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tank_sim ( tank_code VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY, tank_index INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, level_mm DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 5000, rate_mm_per_h DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, rate_bias_mm_per_h DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, max_level_mm DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 10000, valve_open BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hub_sim ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, line_pressure_mpa DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.82, line_flow_m3h DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 1180, line_temp_c DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 11, delta_pressure_mpa DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.03, total_volume_m3 DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL DEFAULT 81000, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ); INSERT INTO hub_sim (id) SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hub_sim WHERE id = 1); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-11', 1, 1662, -430, -430, 10000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-11'); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-12', 2, 1667, 85, 85, 10000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-12'); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-13', 3, 1481, -120, -120, 10000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-13'); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-14', 4, 1597, 40, 40, 10000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-14'); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-15', 5, 1620, -210, -210, 10000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-15'); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-16', 6, 6352, 15, 15, 10000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-16'); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-17', 7, 1762, -55, -55, 10000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-17'); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-18', 8, 11726, 220, 220, 14000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-18'); INSERT INTO tank_sim (tank_code, tank_index, level_mm, rate_mm_per_h, rate_bias_mm_per_h, max_level_mm) SELECT 'tank-19', 9, 1702, -180, -180, 14000 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tank_sim WHERE tank_code = 'tank-19');

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE tank_sim SET rate_mm_per_h = rate_bias_mm_per_h + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 45.0 + tank_index * 0.7) * 35, level_mm = GREATEST(500, LEAST(max_level_mm - 200, level_mm + (rate_bias_mm_per_h + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 45.0 + tank_index * 0.7) * 35) / 3600.0 * 5)), valve_open = ABS(rate_bias_mm_per_h + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 45.0 + tank_index * 0.7) * 35) > 5, updated_at = NOW()"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE hub_sim SET line_pressure_mpa = 0.78 + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 70.0) * 0.06, line_flow_m3h = 1180 + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 50.0) * 80, line_temp_c = 11 + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 90.0) * 2.5, delta_pressure_mpa = 0.03 + ABS(SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 35.0)) * 0.025, total_volume_m3 = 81000 + SIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW()) / 120.0) * 1200, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":""}}]}
